metadata.title: Come to Me
metadata.lyrics:
[00:07.83] Mm-mm
[00:15.49] Come to me when you're all alone and feeling down
[00:25.09] Come to me when there's nobody else around
[00:33.36] Come to me, I'm still waiting, open-armed for you
[00:42.43] Come to me, 'cause I will comfort you
[00:49.83] When you've no one to turn to
[00:54.05] I will be here just for you
[01:01.78] Come to me when your world is empty and cold
[01:08.76] Come to me when you need someone you want to hold
[01:15.89] Come to me, in my arms, I will keep you safe and warm
[01:23.58] Come to me, I will shelter you from the storm
[01:30.74] I'm not one to pretend, but why can't you understand
[01:37.96] That I love you and I love you
[01:45.60] And I need you and I want you
[01:52.67] And I love you and I love you
[02:00.19] And I need you and I want you
[02:07.32] Come to me, oh, baby, hey
[02:14.84] 
[04:32.97] I'm a lonely man
[04:36.00] But if only I could learn to cry
[04:40.26] Maybe then
[04:43.24] The pain inside me would subside
[04:47.66] Come to me and I will comfort you
[04:54.87] Show you what love can do
[05:01.67] I'm a lonely man
[05:04.74] Living in a world of dreams
[05:08.68] I've got everything
[05:12.07] But the one thing that I really need
[05:16.79] Come to me, I'll give you all the love you need
[05:23.54] 'Cause I have love just for you (ooh)
[05:35.78]
